chapter_title: Regul. of Outdoor Signs on Rural Roads
text:
(a) The owner of an off-premise sign erected before September 1, 1985, and registered with the commission before December 31, 1985, may renew the registration of the sign for an annual fee of $10.

(b) The commission by rule may provide for a longer renewal period not to exceed five years.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 394. Regul. of Outdoor Signs on Rural Roads
##### § 394.048 — Registration of Certain Off-premise Signs

(a) The owner of an off-premise sign erected before September 1, 1985, and registered with the commission before December 31, 1985, may renew the registration of the sign for an annual fee of $10.

(b) The commission by rule may provide for a longer renewal period not to exceed five years.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The owner of an off-premise sign erected before September 1, 1985, and registered with the commission before December 31, 1985, may renew the registration of the sign for an annual fee of $10.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The commission by rule may provide for a longer renewal period not to exceed five years.
